item.title: This is not to say we shouldn’t have progressivism, it’s to say that all the “civilization” that America claims to have either b...
item.description:
This is not to say we shouldn’t have progressivism, it’s to say that all the “civilization” that America claims to have either by “traditional values” or by “progress” will , as long as imperialism is the predominant economic system, be supported only insofar as they serve white suprmacy, or imperialism



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They are getting so comfortable they are now telling the truth
item.description:
They are getting so comfortable they are now telling the truth.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is also an incentive structure used to recruit: if u can sell you experience as a war criminal as fitspo, or expertise in a...
item.description:
This is also an incentive structure used to recruit: if u can sell you experience as a war criminal as fitspo, or expertise in any number of things, ofc they get young ppl trying to build a resume.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Use clair as the example bc she is the most clear, the lawyers and real estate agents have a different more complicated relation...
item.description:
Use clair as the example bc she is the most clear, the lawyers and real estate agents have a different more complicated relationship that put them as the lower upper class but it’s not as easy. Also this is not an attack on the creator, I think she gave enough caveats for it to make sense more a jumping off point.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: In case it’s not clear: I’m not a democratic socialist, I am distinctly to the left of them, I just think the dems response to t...
item.description:
In case it’s not clear: I’m not a democratic socialist, I am distinctly to the left of them, I just think the dems response to their candidates winning is absolutly hilarious and deeply telling



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
